summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Thryve Coworking Management System - Admin Panel and Member Portal. Fixed bug in member portal room availability API (was 9AM-8PM, now 10AM-6PM). All 16 member portal backend tests pass. All UI features verified working.

bugs_fixed.issue: Member portal room availability API was returning slots from 9 AM to 8 PM instead of 10 AM to 6 PM
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed start_hour from 09:00 to 10:00 and end_hour from 20:00 to 18:00 (lines 462-463)
bugs_fixed.impact: Member portal now shows consistent time slots with admin panel

passed_tests: Admin Login - 'Manage your World' title displayed correctly
Admin Login - 'Admin Login' badge in bottom left corner
Admin Dashboard - Icon cards with aligned text
Admin Dashboard - Sidebar headers (MANAGEMENT, INVOICING, ADMIN) are bold and readable
Admin Room Booking - Time slots from 10 AM to 6 PM (verified via API)
Member Portal Login - Login/Register tabs working
Member Portal Registration - Only allows emails in member list
Member Portal Login - Successful login with valid credentials
Member Portal Dashboard - Shows member-specific data (name, company, credits)
Member Portal Invoices - Shows member's invoices
Member Portal Room Bookings - Shows 10 AM to 6 PM slots (fixed)
Member Portal Support Tickets - Can view and create tickets
Member Portal Announcements - Shows community announcements
Member Portal Security - Cannot access admin routes (redirects to admin login)
Backend API Security - Member token rejected on admin endpoints
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Member portal has separate authentication system from admin (different JWT token type)
Security properly enforced - member tokens cannot access admin endpoints
Room booking time slots now consistent between admin and member portal (10 AM - 6 PM)
seed_data_creation: Created test member 'Test Member Portal' (testmember@thryve.in) with Private Cabin - 4 Seater plan for testing member portal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Member Portal fully implemented and tested. Two separate auth systems: Admin (/api/auth) and Member (/api/member). Members can only register if their email exists in admin-managed member list. Member portal has: Dashboard, My Invoices, Room Bookings, Support Tickets, Announcements. Room booking slots are 10 AM - 6 PM for both admin and member portal.

admin_dashboard.sidebar_headers: ✓ MANAGEMENT, INVOICING, ADMIN headers bold and readable
